summary:
📋 Weekly Review — w/e 2026-06-22

ISSUES FOUND
- ufc-dashboard: Empty-payload events marked "fresh" — silent extraction failure (ufc-fight-night-medic-vs-rodriguez: has_data=false but is_stale=false). Confirmed live; already tracked in open issue #14, no new file. Fix is idea #4 below.
(Crypto equity-curve seed jump, volleyball zero-footage idle state, and the stale-but-valid 07-25 event were all reviewed and judged non-bugs.)

TOP ENHANCEMENT IDEAS (ranked)
1. crypto-trading — Risk-adjusted metrics: Sharpe/Sortino/max drawdown (effort: low, impact: high): makes the −$453 30d PnL interpretable; equity data already persisted.
2. volleyball — Reference clip + pipeline self-test (effort: low, impact: high): pipeline has processed 0 frames ever; a fixture verifies end-to-end and guards regressions.
3. overseer — Idle-detection + top-of-dashboard rollup digest (effort: low, impact: high): reuses existing flags so reviews are scannable in seconds.
4. ufc-dashboard — Retry-with-backoff + "awaiting-card" vs "parse-failure" status (effort: low, impact: medium): directly fixes the #14 empty-payload bug; stops future events polluting the error list.
5. crypto-trading — Log per-signal feature snapshots on HOLD/no_signal (effort: medium, impact: high): 6/6 signals were no_signal; capturing distance-to-threshold enables tuning.
6. volleyball — Auto coaching reports per clip (rally length, ball speed, contact-zone heatmap) (effort: medium, impact: high): delivers the project's core user value.
7. ufc-dashboard — Per-fighter odds time-series + closing-line-value tracking (effort: medium, impact: high): turns one-shot alerts into trend charts + backtesting.

(Dropped: overseer schema-validation tests — reasonable but lower priority this week.)

Volleyball.reason: read OK but no recent activity / stale data
